hero.subtitle: A 6-stage workflow tool for indie hackers. From idea to monetization, AI assists every decision.

stages.label: WORKFLOW
stages.title: 6 Stages: From Idea to Monetization
stages.subtitle: Not a todo list. A proven indie hacker workflow with clear entry and exit criteria for each stage.

items.label: IDEA
items.desc: Capture inspiration, assess feasibility, use AI to quickly generate competitive analysis.

items.label: VALIDATE
items.desc: GO/NO-GO decision framework. Validate demand with data before building something nobody wants.

items.label: PROTOTYPE
items.desc: AI-assisted MVP planning, tech stack recommendations, and multi-platform launch copy.

items.label: SHIP
items.desc: Project management board with launch checklist to ensure nothing critical is missed.

items.label: GROW
items.desc: Multi-platform content matrix, growth experiment tracking, AI-optimized copy.

items.label: MONETIZE
items.desc: Pricing strategy simulator, revenue forecasting, find the right business model.

features.label: FEATURES
features.title: More Than a Kanban Board
features.subtitle: AI is not an add-on. It is infrastructure woven into every stage.

items.title: AI Pet Coach
items.desc: Each project gets a dedicated AI coach providing stage-specific guidance.

items.title: GO/NO-GO Decisions
items.desc: Structured validation framework. Data-driven decisions, not emotional ones.

items.title: Multi-Platform Copy
items.desc: One-click generation for Twitter, Reddit, ProductHunt, and more.

items.title: Monetization Simulator
items.desc: Input expected users and pricing. AI predicts revenue curves and payback periods.

items.title: Project Blueprint
items.desc: Auto-generated project structure docs, tech stack recommendations, and milestones.

items.title: GitHub Backup
items.desc: Project data syncs to GitHub Discussions. Your data, your control.

deployment.label: DEPLOYMENT
deployment.title: Two Ways to Use, Same Full Experience
deployment.subtitle: We believe open source is not a compromise on business, but the foundation of trust.

selfHosted.title: SELF-HOSTED
selfHosted.desc: Fully open source. Data under your control. Ideal for technical teams and individuals.
features: Unlimited AI calls (bring your own API key)

cloud.title: SPARKBIN CLOUD
cloud.desc: Zero-config, ready to use. Auto updates, managed AI backend. Focus on building products.

pricing.label: PRICING
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Self-hosted is completely free. Cloud is pay-as-you-go with no hidden fees.

tiers.name: Free
tiers.desc: For individual developers and small projects

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.desc: For full-time indie hackers and early teams

cta.title: Your Next Side Project Deserves to Be Taken Seriously
cta.subtitle: Most projects die because "nobody needs it." SparkBin uses a structured 6-stage workflow and AI coach to validate ideas and reduce trial costs.

footer.brand: AI-native project coach for indie hackers.
footer.builtWith: Built with React + FastAPI + Brutalist design
